entity.summary: Ink-native decentralized exchange for AMM swaps, liquidity provision, and trading of tokens launched through the connected InkyPump bonding-curve platform.
entity.notes: HEI treats InkySwap and its InkyPump-linked pre-bond and post-bond trading surfaces as one exchange ecosystem, while retaining InkySwap as the canonical exchange identity.

evidence.title: InkySwap platform introduction
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes InkySwap as an Ink-based decentralized exchange with constant-product AMM trading, liquidity provision, and post-bond trading for InkyPump-launched tokens.

evidence.title: InkySwap protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Independent protocol profile reports current Ink-chain TVL and identifies InkySwap as the DEX where InkyPump tokens receive post-bond liquidity.
